name: C2-band falsifier (overnight, no-HIL, bounded)
north_star: F1 — prove/falsify the LLM-as-Database spec is implementable. This run tests one pre-registered falsifier from runbook §0.3; a clean FAIL is a real result.

policy.output: STAGING ONLY (logs/pending_findings/). The driver NEVER writes CORPUS/*, the append-only ledger, the runbook, or the checkpoint. Operator folds into the canonical §0.4 record on review.
policy.standing_auth: Model pulls + covariance compute + disk/downloads are PRE-APPROVED (logged). Paid-provider + credential moves are GATED → logged to logs/autonomy_gates.jsonl and SKIPPED.
policy.fenced_units: A unit with fenced:true is optimizer-style (Goodhart-prone). It may LOG candidates; a PASS means 'candidate worth a pre-registered falsifier', NOT a conclusion.

units.hypothesis: Editing in the minimum-collinearity band [8-12] yields HIGHER cross-entity read locality (less corruption) than the default band [4-8], at fixed N=100, SEQUENTIAL write. (Sequential, not batch: batch/A1 already eliminates corruption — baseline cross-loc ~98.5% is at ceiling; sequential baseline ~54.8% has the headroom C2 predicts the band will move.)
units.falsifier: If unt_cross_loc([8-12]) is NOT meaningfully higher than unt_cross_loc([4-8]) with both arms clearing the edit-success guard, the C2 collinearity->corruption mechanism does NOT translate to an editing-band advantage — the C2 lead (runbook §0.3) is FALSIFIED for editing. A clean FAIL is a real negative result.
units.loop_note: Deterministic comparison — a retry only helps a TRANSIENT failure (model-pull blip, OOM). Identical re-run gives identical numbers; do not loop to chase a different label.

label_rule.preregistered_note: Thresholds FIXED before the run. PASS=>=5pp (meaningful editing-relevant reduction); PARTIAL=>1pp (directional only); FAIL<=1pp (no editing-relevant effect -> C2 lead falsified for editing); INVALID if either arm's edit success <95 (confounded comparison). Operator may adjust thresholds BEFORE launch; adjusting AFTER seeing results voids pre-registration.
